waypoints.note: Pre-jump: aboard IX TCC C-47 serials forming over the south coast. Position approximates the route start.

disputedBy.claim: 101st sticks scattered widely: many drops fell well outside DZs A (Saint-Martin-de-Varreville), C (Hiesville), and D (Vierville/Saint-Côme-du-Mont). The DZ-C centroid is the planned aim point, not where most sticks actually came down.

waypoints.note: First sticks: pathfinders ahead of the main drop, then 502 PIR to DZ-A, 506 PIR to DZ-C, 501 PIR to DZ-D. Position is the planned DZ-C centroid (the divisional middle DZ); actual stick footprint scattered across the Cotentin interior.
506th PIR (Sink) and 502nd elements rallying around Saint-Marie-du-Mont; first attempts on Causeway exits 1 and 2 behind Utah.
Saint-Marie-du-Mont taken; Causeway 2 (Houdienville–Pouppeville) secured by 1/506; first 4th ID elements reach the inland end of the causeways.
Mid-day: 506th and 501st pushing south toward Saint-Côme-du-Mont and the Carentan road; rear cordon against 6th FJR (German Fallschirmjäger Regiment 6).
End of MVP window: Utah causeway exits held; Saint-Côme-du-Mont contested. Division centroid approximate.
